clusters.justification: These terms map onto the macroscopic regulation, subjective experience, and processing of internal states of valence and physiological arousal, typically anchored in the brain's core affective and salience circuits.

This cluster reflects the overarching neurocomputational domain of assigning subjective weight and incentive salience to stimuli to drive motivated behavior and goal-directed choice, primarily subserved by ventromedial prefrontal and striatal reward circuitry.

These terms encompass the broad, internally-directed processing of complex interpersonal schemas, self-constructs, and autobiographical narratives, highly characteristic of default mode network co-activations.
